name: Scala 3 Development
postStartCommand: git config --global user.name 'Yehor Smoliakov' && git config --global user.email 'egorsmkv@gmail.com' && sudo chown vscode:vscode /workspaces/scala3-devcontainer && if [ -d /workspaces/scala3-devcontainer/.git ]; then sudo chown -R vscode:vscode /workspaces/scala3-devcontainer/.git; fi && mkdir -p /home/vscode/.ssh && if [ -d /tmp/host-ssh ]; then sudo cp /tmp/host-ssh/id_ed25519 /tmp/host-ssh/id_ed25519.pub /home/vscode/.ssh/ 2>/dev/null || true; sudo cp /tmp/host-ssh/known_hosts /home/vscode/.ssh/ 2>/dev/null || true; sudo chown -R vscode:vscode /home/vscode/.ssh; chmod 700 /home/vscode/.ssh && chmod 600 /home/vscode/.ssh/id_ed25519 2>/dev/null || true; chmod 644 /home/vscode/.ssh/id_ed25519.pub /home/vscode/.ssh/known_hosts 2>/dev/null || true; fi && sudo mkdir -p /workspaces/scala3-devcontainer/.metals /workspaces/scala3-devcontainer/.bloop /workspaces/scala3-devcontainer/.bsp && sudo chown -R vscode:vscode /workspaces/scala3-devcontainer/.metals /workspaces/scala3-devcontainer/.bloop /workspaces/scala3-devcontainer/.bsp
postCreateCommand: node --version && npm --version && codex --version && scala3 -version && scala3-compiler -version && scala-cli --version && sbt update && sbt --version
